content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post iter-063)

## §1 HIGH — GR C2 close-out path (the lone GR-quot frontier)
`matrixEnd_pullback` (a) + the abstract transport core `pullbackBaseChangeTransport_matrixToFreeIso` (c-core) are DONE axiom-clean. C2 (`bundleTransition_cocycle`) now needs exactly two things — neither is more diamond-grinding:
1. **Declaration relocation (mechanical, safe).** Move the `pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp` (L1323) + `pullbackFreeIso_comp` (L1400) + `pullbackBaseChangeTransport_matrixToFreeIso` (L1543) cluster to BEFORE C2 (L1045), OR move C2 + the 3 riders to after the cluster. Nothing in L1045–L1530 references `bundleTransition_cocycle` (the riders are sorries); no protected decls in this file. Dispatch the **refactor** subagent for the move (prover should not be asked to reorder a 500-line span mid-proof).
2. **`baseChange_bridge` (b) — the true crux.** Identify `(pullback.fst …).appTop ∘ ΓSpecIso.inv` (and the `t'` version) with `awayInclLeft`/`awayInclRight`/`cocycleΘIJ`. This needs **GrassmannianCells internals** (`theGlueData.f/.t/.t'` ↔ `chartIncl/chartTransition/transitionMap` + localisation structure), which live OUTSIDE GrassmannianQuot.lean. Options: (a) export the needed Cells helpers (cross-file), or (b) a `refactor`/dag-walker to surface the `ΓSpecIso`-naturality lemmas. Consider an **effort-breaker** on `lem:gr_baseChange_bridge` to split the three structural-identity translations (src/mid/tgt) before the prover. This is the same "needs Cells internals" blocker named since iter-061 — do NOT re-assign C2 to a prover until (1)+(2) are staged.

## §2 HIGH — Blueprint coverage debt (22 unmatched lean_aux; 3 new this iter)
Planner authors the prose; review may not. New this iter (substantive — both fully-proven, axiom-clean):
- **`ιFree_matrixEnd`** (GrassmannianQuot.lean:966) — `ιFree j ≫ matrixEnd M = ∑ k, scalarEnd (M k j) ≫ ιFree k`. Used twice in `matrixEnd_pullback`. Suggest `lem:gr_iFree_matrixEnd` under `def:gr_matrixEnd`.
- **`pullbackBaseChangeTransport_matrixToFreeIso`** (GrassmannianQuot.lean:1543) — the reusable (a)→(c) C2-transport bridge. Its docstring already names label `lem:gr_matrixToFreeIso_transport` (currently absent). Add that block; it is the concrete realisation of `lem:gr_bundleCocycle_transport`'s sketch step.
- **`relTensorActL_proj_eq`** (SectionGradedRing.lean:672) — the cofork condition `relTensorActL ≫ relTensorProj = relTensorActR ≫ relTensorProj`. Add a `\lean{}` pin under `def:relTensorProj` or `lem:relativeTensor_as_coequalizer`, OR mark the lemma `private` if treated as pure scaffolding.

Carried (19, pre-existing): GR private Cells-helper ports (`cocycle_imageMatrix_eq'`, `imageMatrix_map_eq'`, `inv_mul_inv_mul_cancel'`, `isUnit_algebraMap_away_left'`, `map_map_eq_of_comp'`, `map_nonsing_inv'`, `mul_submatrix_col'`), `biproduct_matrix_comp`, `bundleMatrix_cancel`, `hasFiniteBiproducts_modules`, `scalarEnd_val_app(_one)`, `unitHomEquiv_scalarEnd`, `unitToPushforward_scalarEnd_comm`; SNAP `objRestrict{,_apply,_id,_comp}`, `opensTopology`. Most are private/internal (acceptable per the doctrine but still invisible to the DAG) — planner may batch-blueprint or accept as private helpers.

## §3 MEDIUM — Structural sync fix for multi-name `\lean{}` fields (RECURRING, 3rd iter)
`lem:relativeTensor_objectwise_coequalizer` (22-name) has had its `\leanok` stripped by `sync_leanok` and manually re-applied by review THREE iters running (060, 061, 063). `lem:gr_glueData_bridges` (3-name) was silently never marked until this iter. `sync_leanok` cannot evaluate comma-separated multi-name `\lean{}` fields. **Recommend a structural fix** so review stops fighting sync every iter: either (a) teach `sync_leanok` to split-and-AND multi-name fields, or (b) split these blocks into one `\lean{}` per sub-decl (verbose but sync-evaluable), or (c) pick a single representative pin per block. Until then, review must keep re-applying. ALSO: lvb-snap flags 9 **private** SNAP decls carry `\leanok` pins (`tensorBraiding`, `unitModule`, `tensorPow_zero/succ`, `sheafificationCounitIso`, `tensorObjUnitIso`, `tensorObjRightUnitor`, `moduleTensorPow_zero`, `MonoidalPresheaf`) — sync may not resolve private qualified names; not observed stripped this iter (sync touched 0 of them) but flagged as fragile. Clarify whether sync handles private names.

## §4 LOW — Stale `.lean` comments (lean-auditor; review can't edit `.lean`)
- **SectionGradedRing.lean:683** (major) — `/- Planner strategy … NOTE (iter-063): leansearch only finds evaluationJointlyReflectsLimits … verify before use -/` sits directly above the now-CLOSED `relativeTensorCoequalizerIso` (L702) and could make a reader doubt the proof. The uncertainty is resolved. Prover/planner should update or delete.
- **SectionGradedRing.lean:763–845** — 82 lines of "superseded handoff notes"; prune.
- **SectionGradedRing.lean:847–962** — `tensorPowAdd` planning block with stale iter markers (ITER-052/053 STATUS); prune obsolete refs.
- **GrassmannianQuot.lean:621–627** — "Resource note (iter-060)" iter-specific clutter in `bundleTransition_self` body.

## §5 Do NOT re-assign without structural change
- **C2 (`bundleTransition_cocycle`)** — do NOT send a prover at C2 until §1(1) relocation + §1(2) `baseChange_bridge` staging are done. The "needs Cells internals" blocker has recurred 3 iters; more diamond tactics will not close it.
- **GR riders** (`universalQuotient`/`tautologicalQuotient`/`represents`) — gate on C2; auto-unblock when it closes. Do not assign in isolation.

## §6 Closest-to-completion / promising
- **GR-quot:** one frontier (C2). Once §1 staged + closed, the 3 riders + `glue` cocycle hyps cascade. This is the critical path to the Grassmannian-Quot representability goal leg.
- **SNAP:** `SectionGradedRing` 0-sorry. Next un-gate = `isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit` (whiskered-stalkwise route) — a NEW not-yet-scaffolded decl; seed it (scaffold keyword on filename line per the no-op-drop fix that worked this iter). The `evaluationJointlyReflectsColimits` + `isColimitMapCoconeCoforkEquiv` recipe is reusable for future functor-category (co)limit promotions.
- **QuotScheme:** 4 sorries untouched — high-level chain gated on SNAP completion (+ graded-Euler/Snapper). Not yet ready.
- **FBC:** parked, off critical path (unchanged). Un-parks only when a lane frees with `_legs_conj` still open.
